title: cestrum mortonianum var. mortonianum
intro: Cestrum mortonianum var. mortonianum, commonly known as the night-blooming cestrum, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cestrum mortonianum var. mortonianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
